title: Qualcomm India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Qualcomm India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Qualcomm India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Qualcomm India:
Qualcomm India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India!
